DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

Defendant Mission Stucco Company'S Motion To Transfer
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul J. Gamba of SELMAN BREITMAN (415-979-2015), appearing for defendant / moving party Mission Stucco Co.
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Richard Hanson, Jr., et al.
Shelley K. Tinkoff of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant Merlex Stucco, Inc

RULING:
DEFENDANT MISSION STUCCO COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE

The Court modified its 10/11/2012 ruling as follows: Defendant Mission Stucco Company's motion to transfer venue is granted. The case will be transferred to Orange County. Once transferred this case is subject to JCCP 4674 (Asbestos Cases), which subject this case to transfer to Los Angeles for pre-trial matters. Eventually this case will be returned to Orange County for trial. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Carol L. Schilp of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 648 (503/TLJ)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard Lee of SELMAN BREITMAN (415-979-2006), appearing for defendant / moving party Mission Stucco Co.
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Richard Hanson, Jr., et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT MISSION STUCCO COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE

Hearing held. The Court ruled as follows: Defendant Mission Stucco Company's motion to transfer venue is granted. The case is ordered transferred to Los Angeles Superior Court for the purposes of Discovery and pretrial motions. The Orange County is designated as the original court. Details of ruling on record. Counsel for defendant to prepare an order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)

After the hearing, the Court ordered the respective counsel to return on October 16, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. for a further hearing. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported. (503/TLJ)

Joinder In Defendant Mission Stucco Company¿S Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Shelley K. Tinkoff of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for joinder / moving party Merlex Stucco, Inc.
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Richard Hanson, Jr., et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT MERLEX STUCCO, INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT MISSION STUCCO COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Merlex Stucco, Inc.'s joinder in Mission Stucco Company's motion to transfer venue is denied as untimely. Merlex Stucco failed to provide proper notice as required by C.C.P. 1005(b) and 1010.6. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
